class.name: mujoco_ros2_control_plugins/HeartbeatPublisherPlugin
class.description: A simple plugin that publishes a heartbeat message every second to demonstrate the plugin system.

class.name: mujoco_ros2_control_plugins/ExternalWrenchPlugin
class.description: Plugin that applies an external wrench (force + torque) to a named MuJoCo body for a configurable duration via the ROS 2 service ~/apply_wrench (mujoco_ros2_control_msgs/srv/ApplyExternalWrench). The force and torque are expressed in the world frame; the application point is expressed in the body's local frame (relative to the body frame origin). Multiple concurrent wrenches on different or the same bodies are supported.
